stemHtml: Which statement about the errors and effects on NDB radio signals is correct?

options.a: Night effect is a result of interference of the surface wave and the space wave causing a reduction in range.
options.b: Lightning during atmospheric disturbances may cause a reduction of the signal strength that may result in only slight bearing errors.
options.c: The mountain effect is caused by reflections onto steep slopes of mountainous terrain which may cause big errors in the bearing.
options.d: Shore line effects may cause a huge bearing error due to reflection of the radio signal onto steep coasts.
